title: Best Women's Hospital & Fertility Centre in Bangalore | Kinder
heading: Welcome To Kinder Women’s Hospital & Fertility Centre
description: Discover nurturing care at the best women’s hospital in Bangalore, Kinder Women’s Hospital & Fertility Centre. Access top pediatric care in Bangalore.
text: Best Women's Hospital & Fertility Centre in Bangalore | Kinder Book an Appointment Book an Appointment Doctors 24/7 Emergency +91 8618 999 833 +91 80 2888 8880 Locator Home About Us Overview Chairman’s Message Our Team About KINDER Medical Group Services Maternity Labor & Delivery Pain Management Obstetrics High Risk Pregnancy Mother & Child care Programme Fetal Medicine Infertility Treatment IVF IUI ICSI Dermatology & Cosmetology Gynecology & Laparoscopic Surgery General Medicine Endocrinology Neonatology General Surgery Anesthesiology & Pain Management Dietetics Paediatrics General Paediatrics Paediatric Surgery in Bangalore Plastic & Cosmetic Surgery General ENT Physiotherapy Audiology and Speech therapy Comprehensive Diagnostic Services 24/7 Emergency Services Packages Kinder Jananimitra Package Kinder Comprehensive Health Check Up Package Kinder Well Women Health Check Up Package Kinder Pre Pregnancy Health Check Up Package Facilities Resources Gallery Media & Events Blogs News Kinderite Infographics Careers Contact Search Generic filters Book your ANC Class Welcome To Kinder Women’s Hospital & Fertility Centre Kinder Women’s Hospital & Fertility Centre, a Unit of Kindorama Healthcare Pvt Ltd, upholds International standards to provide comprehensive and quality health care services , at an affordable cost, to all strata of the society. KINDER hospital envisages providing exceptional service delivery and personalized care with a humane touch. The unit houses about 17 specialities , with an experienced and renowned team of Healthcare professionals and well-trained Para-medics to meet your healthcare needs. Our Services Obstetrics Maternity Labor & Delivery Pain Management Gynecology & Laparoscopic Surgery Paediatrics Neonatology Comprehensive Diagnostic Services 24/7 Emergency Services Infertility Treatment Best Gynaecologist in Bangalore – Gynecologist Hospital in Bangalore Good Maternity Hospital in Bangalore General Medicine General Surgery Plastic & Cosmetic Surgery Dermatology & Cosmetology Endocrinology Anesthesiology & Pain Management General ENT Dietetics Physiotherapy Audiology and Speech therapy Our Specialised Team Dr. Sreeja Rani V R Senior Consultant Obstetrics & Gynaecology Know More Dr. Nidhi Jhawar Senior Consultant Fertility Specialist & Gynaecologist Know More Dr. Sampat Kumar Shettigar Senior Consultant Neonatology & Paediatrics Know More Dr. Jayanth S Sampath Senior Consultant Pediatric Orthopedic Surgeon Know More Dr. Partha Pratim Paul Consultant Pediatrician Pediatric Nephrologist Know More Dr. Rajesh K S Consultant Pediatrician & Neonatologist Know More Dr. Abram Harsha Vardhan Senior Consultant Paediatric Intensivist Know More Dr. Soumya Nayak Pediatric Anesthetist Neuroanaesthesia and Pain Management Know More Dr. Preeti Gaddad Consultant Pediatrician Know More Dr. Shilpa Pandya Senior Consultant Neonatology & Paediatrics Know More Dr. Antony Robert Charles Senior Consultant Paediatric Surgery Know More Dr. Vedarth Dash Senior Consultant Paediatric Surgery Know More Dr. Ravi Kumar Senior Consultant General and Laparoscopic Surgery Know More Dr. Prashanth R Reddy Senior Consultant ENT Surgeon Know More Dr. Madhu Kumar R Consultant Pathologist | MD Pathology Know More Dr. Sarika N. Holla Consultant General Physician Internal Medicine Know More Dr. Kavya Pinnamaneni Consultant Radiologist and Fetal Medicine Specialist Know More Dr. Subathra Ganapathy Consultant Fetal Medicine Know More Dr. Keerthana S Consultant Physiotherapist Know More Ms. Aayesha Parveen Consultant Nutritionist Know More Ms. Nitika Gupta Senior Consultant Audiologist and Speech Language Pathologist Know More Our Health Checkup Packages Kinder Jananimitra Package Kinder Comprehensive Health Check Up Package Kinder Pre Pregnancy Health Check Up Package Kinder Well Women Health Check Up Package Our Facilities NICU – Level 3 Neonatal Transportation Pediatric Intensive Care Unit (PICU) Surgical ICU Labor Suits IVF Laboratory Modular Operation Theatre Blood bank 24/7 Ambulance services 24/7 Emergency Department 24/7 Laboratory Services Pharmacy Testimonials I find the atmosphere of hospital very quiet and disciplined. No hassal at all. Doctors are also very concerning and knowledgeable. Best experience as compared to other near by hospitals.. Anu Gupta We visited Kinder Hospital for IVF and pregnancy treatment, and we received excellent care throughout our journey. The consultation, treatment, continuous support, and valuable suggestions regarding care were truly reassuring and helpful. We are extremely happy and excited to share that we have conceived and our pregnancy is confirmed with healthy twin heartbeats. We sincerely thank the entire team for making our dream come true. Special thanks to Dr. Nidhi Jhawar madam for her guidance, care, and constant support. We are very grateful. Swami Chakra Reddy Excellent service! The doctors and staff are very friendly and professional. Highly recommend! Suman bv Good place for gynaecology related treatment in Bangalore. M Lokesh Reddy The top class treatment and patient care. Best infrastructure and well maintained hygiene. The staff were well trained and very polite, caring and attentive. I appreciate the professionalism and kindness shown by everyone at the hospital. I am really satisfied under go treatment by Dr. Lakshmi Devi and Dr. Sampath . Abhishek Srivastava We had been to Kinder for our second baby and it was a wonderful experience all around. Our Specialist doctors Dr. Yasmin mam (Gynac), Dr Sampat Kumar (Paed) and all other doctors were awesome and they took take care of both Mom and newborn so well. Special mention to all Nursing staff for their caring and expertise in handling the newborn. Housekeeping, security services complimentary photo sessions were equally commendable. Overall very much satisfied and would highly recommend Kinder hospitals to everyone.. Vinoth Kumar Honestly, the best maternity hospital in Bangalore in terms of everything. Cost, care, labour room etc., Dr. Sreeja Rani is just too good. Out of words to describe her Expertise. I am giving 10/10 for her excellent service. Srikkanth Iyer Great hospital. Strongly recommend you to go for any kind of problems related to women. We consulted Dr. Geetha komar and our entire pregnancy was so smooth. She listens all our queries and reply patiently. Hospital staff also very kind and helpful. Sindhura Adusumalli We had come to kinder hospital to meet Dr. chandana ma’am for infertility treatment. And Dr Chandana was really kind and approachable…she was very helpful and made us feel at ease in very step of our procedure….and would really like to thank Dr Chandana and the entire team for being so supportive in our journey. Suku Bailu I recently visited Kinder Women’s Hospital and Fertility Centre with a relative and was extremely impressed with their services . The staff in the outpatient department (OPD) were exceptionally professional and supportive. The overall service provided by Kinder Women’s Hospital whitefield Bangalore was outstanding. They have a dedicated team that ensures every patient receives the best care possible. Highly recommended for anyone in need of their specialized services. Niranjan NK I recently visited Kinder Hospital for my baby boy and consulted Dr. Sampat Kumar Shettigar . He attentively listened to all my concerns about my baby and provided treatment accordingly. What stood out the most was how thoroughly he explained everything—detailing what to do and how to address my baby’s issues. Additionally, his approach to analyzing and checking my baby’s health was exceptional and perfectly suited to my child’s needs. I am genuinely happy with my experience consulting Dr. Sampat Kumar. Saranya The cafeteria service at Kinder Women’s Hospital & Fertility Centre, Bangalore from Rohit Kumar was excellent and was on time and a very polite person. Mr. Prithivi Raj Extremely happy with the way the team at Kinder Women’s Hospital & Fertility Centre, Bangalore treated us. Special mention to Dr. Kavitha G Pujar. Thank you so much Mr. Ayush Subish It has been a great experience at Kinder Women’s Hospital & Fertility Centre, Bangalore. I have been there twice due to one of our known doctor. We all know that our doctor is superb Dr. SUSHANTH. But I am really happy with the cleanliness and great behavior from the staff. Mr. Sabuj Bandopadhyay I must say, Kinder Women’s Hospital & Fertility Centre, Bangalore is a very nice hospital well equipped with latest devices, test & scans with excellent doctors & nursing team. I visited NICU for my pre-term baby. Hospital doctors, nurses, management and staff are very co-operative. Thanks to Dr. Sushanth Shivaswami to make my babies mature to be part of the main stream of world. Thanks to Dr. Leenatha and all the nursing staff to take care of my babies so nicely in NICU. Management is also very good and cooperative. Thanks to Nisha from management for all the quick responses and actions, appreciate a lot. Later I visited the hospital for baby vaccine as well, it’s very fast and well co-operated by staff. Keep it up!!! Mr. Abhishek P R Excellent in the service of doctor and nursing staff, I had admitted my wife for unfortunate termination of pregnancy. Dr. Sreeja mam treated very well and explained the cause in the detailed manner and nursing staff has taken care of my wife and hourly once they were visiting and checking her health condition till the discharge. Housekeeping and maintenance also excellent and they are keeping the room very clean. Food is also nice and they are giving food on time without fail. Thank you so much Kinder Women’s hospital & Fertility Centre, Bangalore, team and management. Mr. Maruthi Prasad D We have selected Kinder Women’s Hospital and Fertility Centre, Bangalore from day 1 of our baby confirmation. They have the best services. Their staff is very polite and supportive. I strongly recommend this hospital. Ms. Rubeena Shaik Had a good experience with Kinder Women’s Hospital & Fertility Centre, Bangalore, and came to meet Dr. Kavitha for my wife’s pregnancy and had a wonderful experience. The customer care team helped us, Thank you. Mr. Rohit R I came to Kinder Women’s Hospital & Fertility Centre, Bangalore during my second Trimester for yoga classes under Physiotherapist Ms. Deepa. I can say that classes were very useful and kept me active during my pregnancy. Ms. Sowmya Dacha We had our first princess born in this hospital, it was an awesome experience during pregnancy and after my wife gave birth. Dr. Kavitha G Pujar was very very supportive in every stage of our pregnancy-related issues and delivery. She made genuine efforts to come out of all the pregnancy complications and deliver our beautiful princess. Thanks 💐💐💐 Kinder Women’s Hospital & Fertility Centre, Bangalore and team 💐💐💐 Mr. Anil S Delivered our second baby at Kinder Women’s Hospital & Fertility Centre, Bangalore recently,and had a great experience. All the staff is extremely cooperative. Ms. Shilpa Rao I want to express my extreme gratitude for the care received at Kinder Women’s Hospital & Fertility Centre, Bangalore. From the moment we stepped in and till the time of discharge, the experience with every department was great, especially your amazing staff Nursing, Housekeeping, Receptionist, Nutritionist, Lactation, Security, and all the departments gave excellent care and made us very comfortable. Many thanks to Dr.Kavitha, Dr. Indu Nair and Dr. Yasmin Imdad for all the Care Mr. Mohammed Munwar Basha We got to know about Kinder Women’s Hospital & Fertility Centre, Bangalore through Dr. Yasmin Imdad, and we really liked the hospitality and service of the nurse and doctors. It’s very clean and everything is on track and in a systematic manner. Kudos to your team. And a great initiative by Dr. Pradeep. Special thanks to the nurses on the 3rd floor and Mr. Siva from the pharmacy team. Mr. Debabrata Dash We had a very good experience with Kinder Women’s Hospital & Fertility Centre, Bangalore. The entire coordination was super smooth. We look forward to more such interaction and association with the team and hospital. We have requested our residents to visit Kinder Hospital and avail their services. Mr. Siva Prakash Thummalapenta Got our first child delivered here at Kinder Women’s Hospital & Fertility Centre, Bangalore. All processes were smooth and hassle-free. Dr. Kavitha is an exceptional doctor who listens patiently to all queries and does not recommend any unnecessary tests or medicines. The room service and the nurses are exceptionally good at managing the baby and all small queries 24*7. The reception guys did their part very well and explained all processes in detail. The cafeteria is on the ground floor and provides hygienic food and room service too. Feeling blessed and would definitely recommend others to avail services in this hospital. Mr. Omeesha Mahanta According to us, Kinder Women’s Hospital & Fertility Centre, Bangalore is the Best Maternity Hospital of Bangalore. We are highly satisfied with their team. Doctors, staff in fact everyone who is there at hospital services are very much cooperative & caring. Our Special THANKS to Dr.Kavitha mam, and Dr.Leenatha mam for giving us our Bundle of Joy. Thanks once again for Everything Kinder😊😊 Ms. Jhumar Raman It was a great experience and hospitality at Kinder Women’s Hospital & Fertility Centre, Bangalore. We would like to express our gratitude to Dr. Yasmin Imdad’s mam. She is polite and always reachable on mobile for any kind of patient queries. She did a laparoscopy for my wife. Thank you Yasmin mam Mr. Manoj Panda We had a good experience at Kinder Women’s Hospital & Fertility Centre, Bangalore starting from consultation, and delivery till post-delivery. Dr. Kavitha Pujar is very calm, informative, and considerate of our concerns. Dr. Indu Nair also took care of the newborn baby very well. The receptionist team, nursing team, nutritionist, lactation, and physiotherapist are extremely helpful. Happy to have our second kid delivered here. Mr. Rakshith Kumar My experience with Kinder Women’s Hospital & Fertility Centre, Bangalore is very good. The hospitality and the Doctor who treated me were very good, especially Dr. Kavitha G Pujar madam. She answered very patiently to all my doubts and guided me in a proper way to have my second child. I would like to thank all the nursing staff housekeeping, they are very kind and courteous towards the patients. Finally, I would like to thank all the doctors and the nurses who visited my room for my daily routine of treatment. Hope this hospital will reach new heights in the near future if they provide this kind of service without any commercial regime. Ms. Parvathi Hazaru We are blessed with a baby boy at Kinder Women’s Hospital & Fertility Centre, Bangalore, We are very thankful to Dr. Kavitha and Dr. Indu madam. The hospital management staff are very attentive, medical staff are also fantastic, especially the hospital staff, they are very caring and friendly, treating us like family members. We would also like to thank Dr. Kavitha and Dr. Indu for their good care. Mr. Jagadeesh Arasoor We had a very good experience at Kinder Women’s Hospital & Fertility Centre, Bangalore, Especially the hospital staff, they are very caring and friendly, treating us like family members. We would also like to thank Dr. Kavitha and Dr. Indu for their good care. Mr. Manikanta Injeti I am very happy with the services provided at Kinder Women’s Hospital & Fertility Centre, Bangalore, I would mainly thank the staff, they are very supportive and friendly people. Ms. Ramya Manjunath Kinder Women’s Hospital & Fertility Centre, Bangalore is a great medical hospital, had a wonderful and warm experience from start to finish. Appreciate the doctors and staff for taking the time to go through the diagnosis and provide the right treatment options. Mr. Raju Hi all, I am here to share my experience with Kinder Women’s Hospital & Fertility Centre, Bangalore. I am blessed with a baby girl at Kinder. Dr. Kavitha & Dr. Indu were Gods in disguise who helped my wife with normal delivery. With their advice and treatment, both my wife and daughter are doing great. My feedback would not be complete if I do not mention the nursing staff who took great care with lots of love towards my daughter. All the staff was very friendly, they listen and fulfilled all our needs. Special thanks to Hannah and Raja Lakshmi Mr. Rahul Gowda We visited Kinder Women’s Hospital & Fertility Centre, Bangalore through the reference of Dr.Kavitha Pujar who a is very caring and friendly doctor. Initially, we were very scared by looking at the hospital from the outside (It looks like a Corporate Office). After meeting with all the Staff and Doctors (On Mother’s Day Program), we come to know that all are very very very humble and have a friendly nature. Last week, we have been blessed with a baby boy. Both mother and baby doing well. I’m very much thankful for the polite “Nursing Staff” at Kinder Hospital. My big big thanks to Dr. Yasmin and Dr. Leenatha (Pediatric) too. Everyone took great care of my wife and newborn baby. Special thanks to Dr. Kavita Pujar madam for constantly following up with my wife and helping her to have normal pregnancy. Mr. Chandrasekhar Pattar We visited Kinder Women’s Hospital & Fertility Centre, Bangalore through the reference of Dr.Kavitha Pujar who a is very caring and friendly doctor. Initially, we were very scared by looking at the hospital from the outside (It looks like a Corporate Office). After meeting with all the Staff and Doctors (On Mother’s Day Program), we come to know that all are very very very humble and have a friendly nature. Last week, we have been blessed with a baby boy. Both mother and baby doing well. I’m very much thankful for the polite “Nursing Staff” at Kinder Hospital. My big big thanks to Dr. Yasmin and Dr. Leenatha (Pediatric) too. Everyone took great care of my wife and newborn baby. Special thanks to Dr. Kavita Pujar madam for constantly following up with my wife and helping her to have normal pregnancy. Mr. Chandrasekhar Pattar We had a very good experience with Kinder Women’s Hospital & Fertility Centre, Bangalore. They did a booster vaccination drive in our apartment – GR Elysium 3 Kadugodi. The entire coordination was super smooth. Roshan and his team did a very commendable job. We look forward to more such interaction and association with the team and the hospital. We got very good feedback from other residents as well. We have requested our residents to visit the hospital and avail their services. Mr. Suraj Nair My husband and I are very grateful and appreciative to Dr. Kavitha who has been a constant support and very warm in all of our concerns and query throughout my delivery. Initially, I was very uncomfortable but later found it very easy. I would like to thank the Nursing Staffs Specially Ashna and Shylaja for all their support and care in OT throughout the operation and post-care. Also like to thank Nurses Neethu, Mahalakshmi, Angel, Biji, Shilpa, and Bhagya for their awesome care and support. Would especially thank Dr.Deepa (Physiotherapist) for her support as I was going through the tail bone injury in my 3rd month of pregnancy, her physiotherapy sessions and lactation session made me stronger. Thank You Dr.Indu, Dr.Leenatha, and Dr.Ganga for all the support and guidance. The staff at Kinder Women’s Hospital & Fertility Centre, Bangalore are very attentive and ensure that patients are well taken care of right from the Doctors on shift, to nurses, reception staff and housekeeping staff. Thank you Navya & team for ensuring formalities and paperwork were smooth. Thanks Kinder. Ms. Neethu Roshan I had visited this hospital through the reference of Dr. Kavita Pujar who is very caring and a friendly doctor and listens to patients with a lot of patience. We have got our b
